The Horn of Hsagra  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 13 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 35
Backstab DMG: 13
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +10 HP: +75 ENDUR: +25
SV COLD: +25
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: WAR RNG SHD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Does it work on an SHD's offhand?
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2005 at 10:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789608946
3 posts
I was wondering, can a ShadowKnight equip the Horn of Hsagra in his/her offhand, using it as a shield, but perhaps with the added (accidental) benefit of dual-wield 1HPierce damage too? Heck, if so, I will buy one ASAP.

But, I expect that it just cannot be equipped in the SHD offhand at all...

Of course, I post to have someone confirm either way, if they have to opportunity.
▲ Page top
Does it work on an SHD's offhand?
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2015 at 10:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719792987793
View User Forum
176 posts
Now, in EQ, if it says SECONDARY, you can put it in secondary as far as I know.
My necro uses a Sorcerers Blade as his secondary, and the sorc blade does have damage / delay stats along with a lot of others.
▲ Page top
RE: Does it work on an SHD's offhand?
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2005 at 5:39 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592763894367
Scholar
39 posts
No, you have to have the dual-wield skill in order to equip this in offhand.

▲ Page top
Horn holds value
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2005 at 9:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1685319470809
208 posts
Just sold this (31 January 2005) on Torvonnilous for 30K, after paying 33K about 1 year earlier. Another was selling for 50K at the same time. Biggest advantage (with the availability of new weapons) of Horn of Hsagra is lack of a required or recommended level requirement. Thus, it seems like a great weapon to use through about mid-upper 40s. After that, there are either better weapons or much cheaper ones that have the same or better efficiency.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 28 2004 at 4:52 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have to get this on this maglo I am going to link of my warrior this item is only item I am missing atm, currently a copper hamemr is in it's place... Review for good ac fixin =)
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 13 2003 at 9:50 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I gave this to my level 5 ranger twink... wow. When I get duel wield I will throw in a swiftblade of zek. That with some nice armor and SCHW makes for a damage dealing machine.

# Dec 07 2003 at 8:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776483461
Scholar
17 posts
I have a warrior alt that I use the horn on. I think it's a great weapon, i'm sure i'll still use it at 65. The main benefit, apart from stats, is that this has a nice dmg without using a dmg bonus. Seeing as there is no damage bonus in your off hand, I use this as my secondary.

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 23 2003 at 10:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This isn't BL usable; he's lying it would seem.
Mainhand???
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2003 at 6:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778958961
17 posts
I'm a Rogue and I was wondering if I should put this in my Mainhand or Offhand. If I put it in my mainhand, I would hit a lot more than I would with RB but my BS's will be a little smaller. But in the mainhand I dont see why it wouldn't do more dmg than having RB in main. Can someone please help me out?
▲ Page top
RE: Mainhand???
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2004 at 12:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591817942072
Scholar
42 posts
Guess it's all a matter of perspective, but I'd put the horn in your primary and RB in secondary. The horn is a much faster weapon allowing duel wield to work more often. The horn also has a better ratio making for better DPS than the other way around, even if only a slight differance. Typically you want your fast weapon in PRI and power weapon in SEC, gives you the best duel-wield DPS.

Backstabs are supposedly more powerful with the power weapon in primary, but seeing as you'll only get about 1 BS per 10 normal attacks with the horn, your backstab would have to do 10x the damage of a regular attack to balance it out. I know at level 41 my horn is doing about 20-40 damage per hit and backstabs for around 170, so I'd prefer faster attacks to stronger backstabs. The ratios are nearly identical though.

My suggestion: Horn in PRI, Ragebringer in SEC

Edited, Tue Oct 26 01:19:10 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Mainhand???
QuoteReply
# May 15 2003 at 10:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966006556
15 posts
Towards level 65 I'd imagine you could wield the Horn in offhand because your dual wield (and double attack) ability should be high enough that you quad constantly.. especially if you've trained AA points into Ambidexterity (improves dual wield) and Ferocity (PoP ability that improves double attack).

You may want to ask a 60+ rogue if they'd concur because my main is not melee class (I have a rogue alt).. but it seems a fair assumption based on observations made.
▲ Page top
RE: Mainhand???
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2003 at 11:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592342778640
170 posts
from what i hear, and i might just as easily be wrong. for rouges backstab you want a high damage weapon in main, and a good ratio weapon in off, if im wrong i dont care so flame to your hearts content, have fun.
▲ Page top
RE: Mainhand???
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2005 at 1:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591790095641
View User Forum
960 posts
The general consensus I've seen is high damage in primary, good ratio in secondary. For rogues in the high end that usually ends up being a powerful piercer in primary (most of their damage is from backstab) and a 1.0+ ratio blunt weapon in secondary.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 29 2002 at 12:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) on Lany's Tvil this item goes for 80-85kpp if Ur a warrior a mainhand weapon with 35ac +75HP + 10sta thats is just awsome with 13/20 isnt it ?
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 10 2002 at 12:04 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Actually this does outdamage the Ragebringer in mainhand. If you switch them both out each time RB in mainhand and HoH in offhand, then switch them to the other set up, the HoH outdamages the ragebringer as it is able to take advantage of the primary hitting much more with lower delay and you do not lose a huge amount of Backstab damage. I suppose on incredibly long fights it may add up, but garunteed the HoH is better not only in exp situations but in many high end raids, as is primal. (Effects favor HoH even more if Avatar is on)
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 08 2002 at 2:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) THIS DOES NOT DROP OFF TORMAX AND THIS WEAPON SHOULD HAVE 35MANA INSTEAD OF AC BECAUSE WARRIOR/ROGUE NEEDMANA NOT AC. ********* HI IM KARASH PUSSYCAT ON DRUZZIL RO SERVER. THIS IS A HARD LONG QUEST FROM A NPC NAMED LADY VOX. GO TO PERMAFROST AND HAIL HER. SHE WILL SAY " HAIL KARASH, SHALL U [HELP ME FIND MY BOTTLE]? SO I SED I WILL HELP U FIND YOUR BOTTLE. SHE SAID VERY WELL ONLY IF U CAN GATHER ME THESE ITEMS. THIS QUEST CAN BE DONE AT LVL 35!! FIRST HEAD TO WESTERN WASTES AND LOOK FOR A NAMED MOB NAME SONTALEK. JUST HAVE A DRUID TRACK HIM... MAKE SURE UR NOT ON COV FACTION. HAIL HIM AND U WILL GET NO RESPONSE. HE WILL CON RED BUT AFTER HAILING HIM 30 TIMES HE WILL HAVE 90% LESS HP THAN LAST TIME N WILL BE SOLOABLE FROM LVL 30! LOOT HIS TALISMAN AND HEAD TO KAEL DRAKKEL. ONCE THERE FIND THE IDOL OF RALLOS ZEK AND HAIL HIM. HE WILL SAY "HEY MATE, I HAVE SOME [BUSINESS] FOR U. I SAID "WHAT BUSINESS". HE SAID " OOOO U ARE A LESSER BEING SO FIGHT ME!" AFTER SAYING THAT HE WILL ALSO DROP 95% OF HIS HEALTH AND WILL BE OVERCONNED... THEN KILL HIM AND LOOT HIS HEAD. AFTER THIS HEAD TO STEAMFONT AND KILL 50 KOBOLDS WHICH WILL TRIGGER THE SPAWN OF VENRIL SATHIR IN KARNOR CASTLE. HAIL HIM AND HE WILL ATTACK! HE IS VERY WEAK SO U CAN KILL HIM AT LVL 35 EASILY. LOOT HIS WING AND BRING ALL THESE TO LADY VOX AND SHE WILL REWARD U!!!
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 08 2002 at 11:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) HI IM KARASH PUSSYCAT ON DRUZZIL RO SERVER. SAY HI TO ME. THIS THING SUX. 35AC..WARRIORS DONT NEED AC. CASTERS NEED AC FOR WHEN THEY GET AGGRO AND SO DO THERE PETS!!! WARRIORS NEED CHA, INT, WIS. MY WAR HAS SO MUCH MANA...TOO BAD IM QUITTING AND ITS UP TO U GUYS TO GET FREE GEAR. I HAVE THIS ITEM BUT IT STINKS... WILL GIVE AWAY.. THANK YOU FOR UR TIME FRIENDS.
Whoa
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2002 at 8:58 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761509905
92 posts
most of this stuff is droppable, and if someone actually threw some of this on a twink... whoa...
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 05 2002 at 12:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) more AC than my barbed ringmail on a dagger! /looks afraid
I won this 2 days ago
QuoteReply
# May 21 2002 at 9:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766419186
88 posts
I just won this the other day, my guild pulled tormax to the wl zone and we owned him, pretty fast fight, easier than vindi imo, we only losy 4 or 5 peeps to him the whole fight, he dropped 4 items including this dagger, i won the roll and really didnt know what i was getting, when i saw the stats my jaw dropped hehe, as a ranger with only "Swiftwind" epic sword and not "Earthcaller" yet i was in need of a nice upgrade witch this fine dagger did, I love the stats and the damage is unsurpassable to my previous weapon "velium maul of superiority" 11/18, the maul weights to much and drains my sta down to fast for lengthy solo fights, with the dagger equiped in primaty and swiftwind in the usual secondary slot I can solo amazingly well in places like velks and fungus grove, I use swarmcaller for slow proc and switch to 1hs 1hp to finish out the fight, works great for me, i have just a shade under 2700hp self buffed with 1120ac so i can take a couple hits from regular type mobs till slow procs. I am still working on last epic though for the better slow proc and only have to switch out 1 weapon insted of 2 then. This is great weapon for any class that can use it, its a versitile weapon for many, I have never been one to claim any weapon "Belongs" to one class if several are listed on it, so grats to all who gets this fine weapon.


Tealaan Wolfguardian
59 Outrider <Riders of the Apocoplypse>
Lanys T'Vyl
▲ Page top
RE: I won this 2 days ago
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2003 at 4:58 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252147362
64 posts
Just an fyi, when you get post 60, sell the piercer, there are better wepons out there, and your Pierce cap is 240...wich means less damage then a 1hs weapon.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 17 2002 at 10:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this makes you think.... how the **** did they give this to a ranger!!!!! wouldn't it be better served on a rogue?
RE: I won this 2 days ago
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 3:33 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592791513703
View User Forum
Scholar
229 posts
Because it does not outdamage Ragebringer in main hand (rogues argue over this, but the log parser5s seem to agree). So for a rogue this is just a very fancy off hand weapon. Sure rogues want it, but there is no reason to default it to them.
▲ Page top
RE: I won this 2 days ago
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2003 at 2:02 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250248405
56 posts
Horn of Hsagra does outdamage Ragebringer as a mainhand weapon on high mitigation (high AC) mobs. Like most Luclin bosses for instance. On normal AC mobs Rage and HoH are usually pretty close in DPS.

~Bax
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 04 2002 at 11:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) It actually has been prooven that a 13/20 in mainhand does deal out more DPS. Someone I know actually rna a test. If it did not outdamage it, why would people use primal in mainhand. (FYI, it procs enough in offhand so that in an exp group and on raids, you never loose the effect)
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 21 2002 at 11:22 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) too the person that asked the money thing, come to Tarew marr the ***** server, these sell all the time, have seen liek 4 sold in the last week rangeing from 120k - 170k, which really isn't that much for this, theres many peeps on our server with easy 400k, seen up too 1 mill k on somone before, but not much more then that, and they still had nice gear on, but anyway , this is a very nice wepon , Great for wars casue of the pimping AC , makes a great combo with a swiftblade of zek,
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 28 2002 at 2:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) As you said you have seen someone with 1 mil pp? Well I had a friend long ago (Right when Kunark Expansion came out) and he could not hold all his money on one charecter due to the fact that you can only have 6 digets in a single coin amount, so he actually made a mule just for cash =-). Just a little reminder that there ARE people out there that are richer than you
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 08 2002 at 4:14 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Man that thing is worth 160,000pp does anyone even have that much money somone please reply if u do!!
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 17 2003 at 6:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I was gifted this just recently. No, not by a guildie, or a friend in an uber guild. No, because I'm a Tier'Dal rogue. My reputation preceeds me.
godly weapon :)
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2002 at 10:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570680292
2 posts
mmhhhh =) just got it and it's awesome.
didnt know if it fitted best in primary (for ratio) or off hand (for bs of RB ) and finally in prim.It roxx =)
aggro is not as terrible as everybody was saying me, sure coz the BS is lower .
Anyway it's a ubby weapon,the ac is so huge =)
i had a emerald scimitar of dawn before,20 34, veru good ratio also,hitting for up to 100 dmg per hit,but the horn blow it :)

WoW this is a very nice weapon, but oyu gotta be kiddin me 5000pp? that really freakin cheap.

kashu Shadowbayne

▲ Page top
choices
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 8:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756744559
4 posts
I have a 13/18 serrated dragon tooth
a 13/20 primal 1hb and
epic 15/25
(60 rogue btw)

atm i still use my epic in main hand, and primal in offhand and not the serated dragon tooth (13/18) becuase i like the BS damage too much of the epic, and can put the SDT in range. When soloing tho i take away the epic and put SDT in main hand and pimal in offhand. I think if i got a primal spear i would put it in main hand till it proced (main hand procs far more than offhand) and epic in offhand, then switch.

If you have primal + epic you dont really need this weapon, its just a nice option, im sure someone without primal could use it more eg a non sleepered keyed warrior.
▲ Page top
RE: choices
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2002 at 5:35 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1595780146528
View User Forum
3 posts
/shrug personally if I were you and lucky enough to get a primal spear I would slap the SDT or this horn in offhand until I got claw of lightning or some other crazy weapon and not even use the primal unless I needed the proc for a named fight. If that is the case you can always swap epic out for primal or if you like the haste put epic offhand, primal main and this or SDT in inventory or ranged slot until avatar goes off.

Also if your guild is doing sleepers you should really consider getting a tunare dagger or /drool vyemm fang/mrylo dagger (well not so much anymore now that vulak is nerfed) to replace epic because the ratio is not amazing.

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 05 2002 at 4:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) though i cant say from experience, but from what i've heard from my fellow rogues that are high lvl, that they actually prefer less damage weap's that dont proc for the very reason of aggro from named mobs, IE:(north tov, sleepers)...but like i say i've never been high enough to even consider going to those places, so their probably just F'ing with me
